texto: It is unclear how much longer people will write on dried and flattened wood. Trees do so much for humans and for our planet that it hardly seems fair to ask them to carry our thoughts as well. From "Life from an RNA World: The Ancestor Within.
explicacao: Citação de Michael Yarus sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “It is unclear how much longer people will write on dried and flattened wood. Trees do so much for…” articula reflexao, trees, writing-on-paper em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como writing-on-paper.
